item.title: ContractingReport41718_final2
item.description:
DOI REPORT AND RECOMMENDATIONS ON THE CITYWIDE CONSTRUCTION FRAUD TASK FORCE’S INVESTIGATION OF A PROCUREMENT FRAUD SCHEME AT THE DEPARTMENT OF ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION AND OTHER CORRUPTION SCHEMES
April 2018
i
EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
The New York City Department of Investigation (DOI) has conducted an investigation with its partners on the Citywide Construction Fraud Task Force1 that identified several corruption schemes attacking the integri ty of government…

item.title: DOC_VisitiorSearch_Report_Appendix_FINAL
item.description:
New York City Department of Investigation
Visitor Searches at the New York City Department of Correction: Ongoing Problems and Recommendations for Change
MARGARET GARNETT COMMISSIONER
Dana A. Roth Inspector General for the Department of Correction May 2019
1
I. Executive Summary
One of the primary functions of the New York City Department of Correction (DOC) is maintaining safety and security within City jails—for inmates, for staff, and for visitors.…

item.description:
